params.prompt: Create a 6-frame storyboard contact sheet for the first half of a short school uniform advertisement, designed as a clean visual overview for video development. Use the uploaded images as references. First image: the boy character in his Royal blue polo and khaki pants — preserve his face, skin tone, and exact uniform throughout. Second image: the Latina mom character — preserve her face, skin tone, and casual home clothes throughout. Brand concept: UNIK school uniforms. Back-to-school ad for Latino families in LA. First day of school morning — a Latina mom gets her son ready. Emotional core: care and pride. Visual style: Candid documentary. Warm available morning light — soft, golden, through home windows. No studio lighting. Handheld camera feel. Warm palette, natural grain, real home environment. Intimate and honest — not polished, not a commercial look. Story arc: It's the first day of school. The morning begins with a calendar showing the date circled. Then we move inside — mom and son, getting ready together. She fixes his uniform with care. He stands proud. Frame-by-frame: 01 — Close-up on a wall calendar. A date in late August or September is circled in red marker. Morning light on the paper. No people yet — just the calendar and the weight of what day it is. 02 — Medium shot. Mom stands behind the boy, both facing a mirror. Her hands rest on his shoulders, smoothing the Royal blue polo. Boy looks at his own reflection. 03 — Full body medium shot. Boy stands straight facing the camera, full uniform visible — Royal blue polo tucked into khaki pants. Natural light. Slight proud expression. 04 — Extreme close-up. The polo collar folded neatly at his neck. Royal blue ribbed fabric, clean and crisp. Mom fingers just visible adjusting it. 05 — Low angle. Mom kneels to the boy level, both hands on his collar, eyes on him. Her expression warm and focused. Boy looks slightly ahead — serious, a little nervous, a little proud. 06 — Medium shot from behind. Mom hands zipping up his backpack on his back. He stands still, shoulders back, uniform sharp. Morning light from a nearby window. Continuity: Same boy throughout — Latino, 7-8 years old, Royal blue polo and khaki pants, identical in every frame. Same mom — Latina, early 30s, casual home clothes. Same warm LA home interior. Consistent soft morning light. Quality: Photorealistic. Real skin tones, real fabric. Looks like a real family, not models. Understated emotion. No frame numbers, captions, studio lighting, altered uniform colors, broken anatomy, stock photo expressions.
